title: Add manual notifications page and remove Tempo Traveller option

requirements.text: Add a manual notifications/admin page in the frontend that lets the site owner view incoming cab booking requests as a list (most recent first), including booking reference ID, customer name, customer phone, and booking timestamp, with a visible loading state, empty state, and a manual refresh action.
acceptanceCriteria: A new UI entry point exists in the header (or a clearly visible section link) that opens a Notifications/Admin view without leaving the app.
The Notifications/Admin view fetches bookings from the backend and renders them in a readable list/table with: reference ID, name, phone, and formatted timestamp.
The view shows a loading indicator while fetching, an empty state message when there are no bookings, and a 'Refresh' control that refetches the list on demand.
Bookings are displayed in reverse chronological order (newest first).

requirements.text: Update the backend canister API to support the manual notifications page by providing a query method that returns bookings together with their booking reference IDs (not just booking values), ordered by timestamp (newest first).

quotes: where should i get notification that someone has booked a cab

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a query method that returns an array containing each booking's reference ID together with its booking details (name, phone, timestamp).
The returned list is sorted with newest bookings first.
Frontend Notifications/Admin view uses this method so it can display booking reference IDs alongside booking details.

requirements.text: Remove the Tempo Traveller option from the vehicle/pricing section and from the booking flow vehicle selection so users can only choose Sedan or SUV.
acceptanceCriteria: The Tempo Traveller card is removed from `frontend/src/components/VehiclePricingSection.tsx` so only Sedan and SUV are shown.
The Tempo Traveller option is removed from the 'Car Type' select in `frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx` so it cannot be selected.
If any existing UI text references 'tempo traveller' (e.g., image alt text in the vehicle section), it is updated to match the remaining vehicle options.

requirements.text: Update the static vehicle set image used in the vehicle/pricing section so it no longer includes a Tempo Traveller, and update the frontend to use the updated asset filename from `frontend/public/assets/generated`.
acceptanceCriteria: A new generated static image exists under `frontend/public/assets/generated` that visually matches the current style but includes only Sedan and SUV.
`frontend/src/components/VehiclePricingSection.tsx` references the updated image filename, and the rendered image no longer depicts a Tempo Traveller.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in `backend/main.mo` (no additional backend services).
Do not edit files under `frontend/src/components/ui` or other `frontend.immutablePaths`; compose existing UI components instead.
Do not add email/SMS/push notification integrations; the notifications page is a manual, in-app view only.
Store and serve generated images as static files under `frontend/public/assets/generated` and reference them directly from the frontend.
nonGoals: Implementing real-time notifications (WebSockets, push notifications, live updates).
Adding third-party authentication/authorization beyond the existing Internet Identity setup.
Adding external databases or exporting bookings to external systems.

edits: Remove the tempo traveller vehicle from the fleet illustration (vehicle-set.dim_1200x400.png > vehicle-set-no-tempo.dim_1200x400.png)
